annotations.title: Generate Brand Color Scheme From Colors

tools.description: Generates a brand color scheme from a list of brand colors. The input is several named colors in hex format (e.g., {"neutralKey": "#FF0000", "primaryKey": "#00FF00", "secondaryKey": "#68748B", "tertiaryKey": "#588493"]), and the output is a unified color scheme with colors in hex format (e.g., {"primary": "#041E49", "secondary": "#68748B"}).

inputSchema.description: Request message for `GenerateBrandColorScheme`. Used to generate a consistent Material Design color scheme from a set of "seed" key colors.

backgroundKey.description: Optional. The neutral key color used to generate the color scheme. If omitted, it will be automatically derived from the other keys. Can be a hex code or any CSS color name.

primaryKey.description: Required. The primary key color used as the main seed for the scheme. Can be a 6-character hex code (e.g., "#4285F4" or "4285F4"), or any standard CSS color name (e.g., "blue").

secondaryKey.description: Optional. The secondary key color used to generate the color scheme. If omitted, it will be automatically derived from the other keys. Can be a hex code or any CSS color name.

tertiaryKey.description: Optional. The tertiary key color used to generate the color scheme. If omitted, it will be automatically derived from the other keys. Can be a hex code or any CSS color name.

tools.name: generate_brand_color_scheme

BrandColorScheme.description: Represents a complete brand color scheme generated for a specific design context (e.g., light or dark theme).

backgroundIsDerived.description: Whether the background key color was automatically derived from other keys.

backgroundKey.description: The background key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

contrastLevel.description: The contrast level of the color scheme. Values range from -1 (minimum contrast) to 1 (maximum contrast). 0 represents standard contrast (i.e. the design as specified).

isDark.description: Whether this color scheme is intended for a dark theme application.

namedColors.description: A map of color role names to their calculated hex color values. Keys follow snake_case naming conventions for semantic Material Design roles (e.g., "on_primary_container", "surface_bright"). Values are colors in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

primaryKey.description: The primary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

secondaryIsDerived.description: Whether the secondary key color was automatically derived from other keys.

secondaryKey.description: The secondary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

tertiaryIsDerived.description: Whether the tertiary key color was automatically derived from other keys.

tertiaryKey.description: The tertiary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

outputSchema.description: Response message for the `GenerateBrandColorScheme` method. Contains the color scheme generated from the input keys.

tools.description: Extracts the background and accent colors from an image. Use this to create a color palette that matches a given image. The input is an image encoded as base64, and the output is a list of brand colors in hex format (e.g., [#041E49, #68748B, #E1E2E8]).

ImageContent.description: Represents a single image, such as a screenshot.

data.description: Required. Image data, encoded as a base64 string.

mimeType.description: Required. MIME type of the image (e.g., "image/png", "image/jpeg").

image.description: Required. The image to use for extracting brand colors.

tools.name: extract_brand_colors_from_image

backgroundKey.description: The background key color extracted. Returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

primaryKey.description: The primary key color extracted. Returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00"). If no primary key color can be extracted, this will be empty.

secondaryKey.description: The secondary key color extracted. Returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

tertiaryKey.description: The tertiary key color extracted. Returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

annotations.title: Extract Colors and Generate Color Scheme

tools.description: Extracts the background and accent colors from an image, and generates a brand color scheme from them. The input is an image encoded as base64, and the output is a unified color scheme with colors in hex format (e.g., {"primary": "#041E49", "secondary": "#68748B"}).

ImageContent.description: Represents a single image, such as a screenshot.

data.description: Required. Image data, encoded as a base64 string.

mimeType.description: Required. MIME type of the image (e.g., "image/png", "image/jpeg").

image.description: Required. The image to extract key colors from.

tools.name: extract_and_generate_brand_color_scheme

BrandColorScheme.description: Represents a complete brand color scheme generated for a specific design context (e.g., light or dark theme).

backgroundIsDerived.description: Whether the background key color was automatically derived from other keys.

backgroundKey.description: The background key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

contrastLevel.description: The contrast level of the color scheme. Values range from -1 (minimum contrast) to 1 (maximum contrast). 0 represents standard contrast (i.e. the design as specified).

isDark.description: Whether this color scheme is intended for a dark theme application.

namedColors.description: A map of color role names to their calculated hex color values. Keys follow snake_case naming conventions for semantic Material Design roles (e.g., "on_primary_container", "surface_bright"). Values are colors in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

primaryKey.description: The primary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format (e.g., "#00FF00").

secondaryIsDerived.description: Whether the secondary key color was automatically derived from other keys.

secondaryKey.description: The secondary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

tertiaryIsDerived.description: Whether the tertiary key color was automatically derived from other keys.

tertiaryKey.description: The tertiary key color used for generating the color scheme. Always returned in 6-character hex format.

tools.description: Finds appropriate Material Design icons matching keywords that describe their usage, style, or shape.

inputSchema.description: Request message for the `FindIcons` method. Used to search for Material Design icons or symbols based on semantic tags.

iconSet.description: Optional. The icon set to search within (e.g., "Material Symbols", "Material Icons"). If omitted, the default icon set of the environment is used.

tags.description: Required. A list of semantic keywords or metadata tags that describe the desired icon's visual or functional properties. If possible, specify at least three tags to describe usage, style, and shape. Examples: - For a "save" icon: ["save", "diskette", "document", "storage"] - For a "home" icon: ["home", "house", "building"] If multiple tags are provided, the service returns icons that match any part of the tag list, ordered by relevance (number of matching tags). If no tags are provided, all icons are returned.

tools.name: search_icons

outputSchema.description: Response message for the `FindIcons` method. Contains a list of matching icon names.

icons.description: The names of icons that match the provided tags, ordered by relevance.

tools.description: Provides essential and critical instructions on how to use Material Icons and Material Symbols efficiently on Web.
tools.name: icons_instructions

instructions.description: Instructions on how to use Google Material Icons and Google Symbols efficiently.

tools.description: Finds appropriate fonts matching categories and/or languages.

inputSchema.description: Request message for the `FindFonts` method. Used to discover Google Fonts based on categories or supported languages.

categories.description: Optional. One or more categories to filter font families (e.g., "serif", "sans-serif", "handwriting").

languages.description: Optional. Language tags in BCP47 format to filter fonts that support specific scripts (e.g., "en_Latn", "zh_Hans").

platform.description: Required. The platform in which the font family is going to be used.
x-google-enum-descriptions: Default value (not specifying usually defaults to web)

sort.description: Optional. The sort order for the returned font families. Defaults to POPULARITY_DESCENDING if unspecified.
x-google-enum-descriptions: Unspecified sort order. Defaults to POPULARITY_DESCENDING.
Sort by popularity, most popular first.
Sort by popularity, least popular first.
Sort by trending, most trending first.
Sort by trending, least trending first.
Sort by date added, oldest first.
Sort by date added, newest first.

tools.name: search_fonts

outputSchema.description: Response message for the `FindFonts` method. Contains a list of font family names.

errorHelp.description: Optional. Contextual help text or error descriptions if the query failed.

fontFamilies.description: The names of font families that match the search criteria (e.g., "Roboto", "Open Sans").

tools.description: Describes a font family in detail, including its look and feel, supported styles, weights and how to use it.

inputSchema.description: Request message for the `DescribeFont` method. Used to retrieve detailed metadata and usage guidance for a specific font.

fontFamily.description: Required. The full name of the font family to describe. Example: "Roboto", "Noto Sans".

platform.description: Required. The platform in which the font family is going to be used.
x-google-enum-descriptions: Default value (not specifying usually defaults to web)

tools.name: describe_font

outputSchema.description: Response message for the `DescribeFont` method. Contains descriptive metadata and features for the requested font.

description.description: Description of the font family, in Markdown format.

errorHelp.description: Optional. Contextual help text if the font family name was not found or is invalid.

features.description: Supported features of the font family such as weight, style and variable axes, if available, in Markdown format.

guidance.description: Guidance on how to effectively use the font family, if available.

languages.description: List of supported language and script in BCP47 format.
